Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be done after Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average waiting time to the SW-Checklist Completed following Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completed when preceded by SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Checklist Completed after the execution of Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time between Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission and SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Total time until SW-Checklist Completed is performed in variants that lead to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time of SW-Checklist Completed in cases where the subsequent activity is SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-AE Assign Reviewers in complex reviewer assignment variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Checklist Completed and the first occurrence of any reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection, SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include multiple revision cycles
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Checklist Completed to be followed by a decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Checklist Completed in cases that eventually reach RW-EIC Accept
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Checklist Completed and Manuscript Export Succeeded in resubmission contexts
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Time of SW-Checklist Completed relative to the start of the process in high-duration variants exceeding 30 million milliseconds
Metric: the average of the function base > 30000000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Checklist Completed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
